name: Courier / Messenger
description: Fast, discrete, and carries more secrets in their satchel than most spymasters. The envelope is sealed — that's all they need to know.
dialogue_hooks: asking for directions or road conditions ahead
looking for a specific person to deliver to
resting at the tavern and willing to carry a message for a fee
nervously clutching their satchel and wanting to leave quickly
voice_patterns: casual road companion — happy to walk with you for safety
tight-lipped — the job is silence, pays well for it
chatty gossip — knows news from everywhere, can't help sharing

schedule.night: resting at inn, sorting next day's route
